statement: "Art is not what you see, but what you make others see. The canvas is a mirror, and every viewer brings their own reflection." — Ushaswi Potlapally, Studio Journal 2024

education: Self-taught artist with 5+ years of dedicated practice
Ceramics study with master potters in Kerala

exhibitions.title: Emerging Voices
exhibitions.description: Group exhibition featuring 12 emerging Indian artists working across mediums.

exhibitions.title: Intimate Scale
exhibitions.description: First solo exhibition showcasing miniature sculptures and works on paper.

exhibitions.title: Craft Contemporary
exhibitions.description: Curated exhibition exploring the intersection of traditional craft and contemporary art.

awards.title: Emerging Artist Grant
awards.description: Awarded for innovative work combining traditional craft with contemporary practice.

publications: Work featured in "The Art of Making" online publication, 2023
